final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: travel brochure, tri-fold layout, physical mockup
Primary request: a tri-fold travel guide brochure for Hangzhou 4-day 3-night itinerary, featuring famous scenic spots as illustrated landmarks floating above real Hangzhou map background on textured cardstock
Scene/backdrop: real Hangzhou city map as base layer, with scenic spot illustrations appearing to float/suspend above cream-colored textured cardstock paper
Subject: illustrated landmarks including 断桥残雪, 白堤, 孤山, 曲院风荷, 苏堤春晓, 花港观鱼, 雷峰塔, 柳浪闻莺, 灵隐寺, 飞来峰造像, 法喜寺, 九溪烟树, 龙井村, 云栖竹径, 拱宸桥, 西溪湿地, each with distinctive architectural features and recognizable silhouettes
Style/medium: illustrated infographic with clean vector-style icons, layered paper craft aesthetic, modern travel guide design
Composition/framing: tri-fold brochure layout (three panels), top-down flat lay view, landmarks arranged along map routes with connecting path lines
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, clean and inviting travel planning mood, subtle drop shadows under floating elements
Color palette: jade green (西湖/龙井), warm terracotta (雷峰塔/古建筑), soft cream (cardstock), muted blue (water elements), sage green (tea fields)
Materials/textures: textured cardstock paper base, matte illustration finish, subtle emboss effect on landmark icons, clean sans-serif typography
Text (verbatim): "第一天：西湖经典游" "断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺" "第二天：禅意杭州" "灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城" "第三天：九溪烟树徒步" "九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径" "第四天：文艺收官"
Constraints: must show real Hangzhou geographic layout as background, landmarks must be recognizable and stylistically consistent, tri-fold format clearly visible
Avoid: cluttered layout, unreadable small text, generic stock icons, photorealistic rendering instead of illustrated style, missing geographic accuracy
